action_description: Detect invoices 7+ days past due. Draft polite payment follow-up email.
trigger_definition: Invoice due date + 7 days with no payment recorded
success_metric: DSO reduced; no invoice goes 30+ days unpaid without escalation
failure_metric: Invoice goes 30+ days unpaid without contact

action_description: Track sent proposals with no response after 5 business days. Draft follow-up email.
trigger_definition: Proposal sent + 5 business days with no response detected
success_metric: Every unanswered proposal followed up within 6 business days
failure_metric: Proposal goes 10+ days without follow-up

action_description: Detect opportunities with no activity in 10+ days and draft follow-up outreach for each.
business_goal: Prevent deal decay and lost revenue from inattention
trigger_definition: Every Monday and Thursday 08:00
success_metric: All active deals touched within 10 days
failure_metric: Deal goes cold without follow-up

action_description: Generate a ranked morning brief of top 5 decisions, blockers, and opportunities requiring CEO attention today.
business_goal: Focus CEO time on highest-leverage items only
trigger_definition: Daily at 07:00 local time
success_metric: CEO reviews brief within 30 min of generation
failure_metric: Brief not generated or not reviewed

action_description: Detect documents awaiting signature for 3+ business days. Draft reminder to counterparty.
business_goal: Prevent deal delays from signature bottlenecks
trigger_definition: Document sent for signature + 3 business days with no execution
success_metric: No document awaiting signature for more than 5 business days
failure_metric: Signed document delayed by 10+ days

action_description: Generate a structured weekly pipeline review doc: deal stages, last activity, next steps, probability, and recommended focus.
business_goal: Enable structured pipeline review without manual prep
trigger_definition: Every Friday 15:00
success_metric: Pipeline reviewed weekly with complete data
failure_metric: Pipeline review skipped due to no prepared pack

action_description: After a business development meeting, draft a follow-up note that advances the relationship to a concrete next commercial step.
business_goal: Convert BD meetings into pipeline movement
trigger_definition: BD meeting flagged in calendar ends
success_metric: Every BD meeting produces a follow-up within 24 hours
failure_metric: BD meeting with no documented next step after 48 hours

action_description: Extract and track commitments made by CEO in emails and meetings. Surface overdue commitments weekly.
business_goal: Prevent dropped commitments that damage relationships
trigger_definition: Weekly on Monday 08:00; also after each meeting transcript processed
success_metric: Zero overdue CEO commitments older than 7 days
failure_metric: Commitment dropped without resolution

action_description: Track active utility applications and interconnection requests. Draft follow-up when no response received in 14 days.
business_goal: Prevent project delays from utility responsiveness gaps
trigger_definition: Every Monday 09:00; also threshold: 14 days since last response
success_metric: No interconnection application goes 14 days without follow-up
failure_metric: Application delayed due to missed follow-up

action_description: Scan CEO inbox twice daily and categorize: urgent-reply-needed, delegate, read-only, archive. Surface only the urgent items.
business_goal: CEO only sees emails requiring their personal response
trigger_definition: Daily at 09:00 and 14:00
success_metric: CEO inbox review time under 20 min/day
failure_metric: CEO spending 60+ min/day on email triage

action_description: 30 minutes before any external meeting, generate a dossier: attendee context, last interaction, open items, suggested talking points.
business_goal: CEO enters every external meeting prepared
trigger_definition: 30 min before each calendar event with external attendees
success_metric: Dossier delivered before meeting starts
failure_metric: Meeting starts without dossier

action_description: After each meeting, extract action items, owners, and deadlines from notes or transcript. Draft follow-up summary email.
business_goal: Convert meetings into accountable next steps
trigger_definition: Within 15 min of calendar event end time
success_metric: Action items extracted and drafted within 30 min of meeting end
failure_metric: No follow-up generated within 2 hours

action_description: Maintain a live log of all open items across projects with owner, due date, and status. Surface aging items daily.
business_goal: Single source of truth for what is outstanding
trigger_definition: Daily 08:00 — refresh and surface items aging past threshold
success_metric: All open items visible with owner and due date
failure_metric: Items falling through cracks without tracking

action_description: When a meeting ends or email is sent, auto-schedule a follow-up reminder for 5 business days if no response or next step has been logged.
business_goal: Ensure no outreach or commitment goes untracked
trigger_definition: Email sent to external party or meeting with external party ends
success_metric: 100% of external outreach has a scheduled follow-up
failure_metric: Follow-up dropped because reminder was never set

action_description: Collect all pending approvals across projects and present as a single batched decision pack twice daily rather than interrupting with individual requests.
business_goal: Reduce context-switching cost for CEO approvals
trigger_definition: Daily at 12:00 and 17:00
success_metric: Approvals processed same day without individual interrupts
failure_metric: CEO interrupted for approvals outside batch window

action_description: Track last contact date with key partners, investors, utilities, and counterparties. Alert when any key relationship has gone silent for 14+ days.
business_goal: Prevent relationship decay with high-value counterparties
trigger_definition: Every Monday 08:00
success_metric: No key relationship silent for more than 14 days
failure_metric: Important partner goes 30+ days without contact

action_description: Monitor active contracts for unsigned, expired, or approaching-renewal status. Surface and draft reminder communications.
business_goal: Prevent revenue loss from missed contract milestones
trigger_definition: Weekly on Wednesday 09:00
success_metric: No contract milestone missed
failure_metric: Contract expires without renewal outreach

action_description: For active transactions, track outstanding diligence items. Surface overdue items and draft request emails for missing documents.
business_goal: Prevent deal delays from incomplete diligence
trigger_definition: Every Tuesday and Friday 09:00 during active transactions
success_metric: No diligence item overdue by more than 3 days
failure_metric: Deal delayed due to missing documents

action_description: Scan emails for implied tasks, commitments, and action items. Add them to the task system with suggested owner and due date.
business_goal: Prevent tasks buried in email from being dropped
trigger_definition: New emails containing action-implied language processed twice daily
success_metric: Zero email-embedded tasks dropped
failure_metric: Commitments found in email that never became tasks

action_description: Every Friday, generate a strategic summary: pipeline status, project health, relationship risks, open decisions, and recommended actions for next week.
business_goal: CEO enters each week with full situational awareness
trigger_definition: Every Friday at 16:00
success_metric: Brief reviewed before end of Friday
failure_metric: Brief not generated or not reviewed

action_description: Auto-generate standard weekly status reports for active projects, pulling current data rather than requiring manual assembly.
business_goal: Eliminate hours of manual report compilation each week
trigger_definition: Every Friday 14:00
success_metric: Status reports generated without human assembly
failure_metric: Report still requires manual data gathering

action_description: Daily list of all items awaiting approval older than 24 hours, with context and recommended action.
business_goal: Prevent workflow bottlenecks from approval delays
trigger_definition: Daily at 09:00
success_metric: No approval item pending more than 48 hours without escalation
failure_metric: Workflow blocked for 5+ days on unanswered approval

action_description: After each meeting, assign owners to each extracted action item and send each owner their specific task via email.
business_goal: Ensure meetings produce accountable outcomes not just notes
trigger_definition: Meeting ends and action items are extracted (follows ACT-0009)
success_metric: 100% of extracted action items assigned to a named owner
failure_metric: Meeting recap with unowned action items

action_description: Detect when project milestones are tracking late based on schedule. Surface slippage and draft escalation note.
business_goal: Catch schedule slippage early before it compounds
trigger_definition: Milestone projected late by 3+ days based on current progress
success_metric: Slippage detected within 3 days of threshold breach
failure_metric: Project misses milestone without prior detection
notes: Requires project scheduler integration — OPEN ITEM

action_description: When a blocker has been open for 3+ days without resolution, auto-escalate to CEO with context and recommended action.
business_goal: Prevent blockers from stalling execution without CEO awareness
trigger_definition: Blocker item open for 3+ days with no status change
success_metric: All blockers escalated to CEO within 3 days of opening
failure_metric: Blocker sits unresolved for 7+ days without CEO awareness

action_description: Weekly ranking of active prospects by deal size, urgency signals, and engagement recency. Output a ranked outreach priority list.
business_goal: Direct sales attention to highest-value opportunities first
trigger_definition: Every Monday 07:30
success_metric: Outreach prioritized by value, not recency
failure_metric: Low-value prospects receiving disproportionate attention

action_description: Track all vendor deliverable deadlines. Alert 5 days before and on the day of missed deadlines.
business_goal: Prevent project delays from vendor slippage
trigger_definition: 5 days before vendor deadline; again if missed
success_metric: All vendor deadlines tracked with 5-day advance notice
failure_metric: Deadline missed without any prior alert

action_description: Weekly list of all unresolved commercial issues: pricing disputes, scope questions, payment holds, and contract interpretation questions.
business_goal: Prevent commercial issues from becoming crises through inattention
trigger_definition: Every Wednesday 09:00
success_metric: All commercial issues reviewed weekly with clear next action
failure_metric: Commercial issue unresolved for 30+ days

action_description: Daily digest of relevant ERCOT and energy market signals, regulatory announcements, and interconnection queue updates affecting active projects.
business_goal: Ensure commercial team has relevant market context without manual research
trigger_definition: Daily at 07:00
success_metric: Daily digest available before 08:00
failure_metric: Team unaware of material market event for 24+ hours
notes: Requires ERCOT/market data feed integration — OPEN ITEM

action_description: Track permit application deadlines and renewal dates. Alert 30 days and 7 days before expiry.
business_goal: Prevent project delays from missed permit deadlines
trigger_definition: 30 days and 7 days before permit deadline
success_metric: Zero permits expired without renewal initiated
failure_metric: Permit expired causing project delay
notes: Requires permit register — OPEN ITEM to build

action_description: Identify emails or documents containing language indicating commercial disputes, payment refusals, scope disagreements, or contract breaches. Flag for CEO review.
business_goal: Catch commercial risks before they escalate to disputes
trigger_definition: Email or document contains risk-flagging keywords
success_metric: Commercial risks surfaced within 24 hours of detection
failure_metric: Risk identified after damage already done

action_description: Track outstanding document requests (financials, permits, title, surveys). Draft reminders for anything overdue by 3+ days.
business_goal: Keep document collection from bottlenecking transactions
trigger_definition: Document requested + 3 business days with no receipt
success_metric: All document requests followed up within 4 business days
failure_metric: Document gap discovered at closing

action_description: Scan upcoming calendar for meetings that match low-value patterns (status updates, info-sharing, no CEO decision required) and recommend decline or delegate.
business_goal: Protect CEO calendar from meetings that don't need CEO
trigger_definition: Every Sunday evening and daily at 08:00
success_metric: CEO declines or delegates at least 1 flagged meeting/week
failure_metric: Zero flags generated in a week

action_description: Categorize and archive read-only, FYI, and automated emails automatically. Flag only emails requiring action.
business_goal: Eliminate inbox noise and reduce time-to-important
trigger_definition: New email received — continuous processing
success_metric: Inbox contains only action-required emails
failure_metric: CEO manually sorting 50+ routine emails per day

action_description: Track submitted permit applications. Draft follow-up when no response received in 21 days.
trigger_definition: Permit application submitted + 21 days no response
success_metric: All permit applications followed up within 22 days of submission
failure_metric: Application sits 30+ days without follow-up

action_description: Continuously analyze tasks and emails to identify work patterns that occur 3+ times per month and are candidates for automation. Output candidate actions.
business_goal: Continuously reduce manual burden by identifying automation candidates
trigger_definition: Monthly analysis run on first day of each month
success_metric: At least 2 new automation candidates identified per month
failure_metric: No new automations identified in 3 months

action_description: Detect emails sent to key commercial partners with no response in 5 business days. Escalate to CEO for direct outreach.
business_goal: Prevent stalled negotiations from partner non-responsiveness
trigger_definition: Email to key partner contact + 5 business days no reply
success_metric: No unanswered partner email >5 days
failure_metric: Negotiation stalled without detection

action_description: For recurring and external meetings, auto-draft agenda based on open items, prior meeting notes, and stated objectives.
business_goal: Eliminate manual agenda creation for routine meetings
trigger_definition: 24 hours before each meeting with 3+ attendees
success_metric: Agenda drafted and distributed before 80% of meetings
failure_metric: Meetings regularly starting without agendas

action_description: Identify tasks in CEO queue that should be delegated based on nature, complexity, and staff capability. Produce weekly delegation list.
business_goal: Remove non-CEO work from CEO queue
trigger_definition: Weekly on Monday 08:00
success_metric: 20%+ of CEO tasks rerouted to staff monthly
failure_metric: CEO completing tasks that could have been delegated

action_description: For inbound emails matching routine request patterns (scheduling, info requests, standard confirmations), draft suggested replies for review.
business_goal: Reduce time spent drafting routine email replies
trigger_definition: Inbound email classified as routine request type
success_metric: 50%+ of routine emails have drafted reply ready within 1 hour
failure_metric: CEO spending time drafting routine replies from scratch

action_description: Weekly scan of CRM for missing contact info, stale stages, deals with no next step, and duplicate entries. Generate cleanup list.
business_goal: Ensure CRM remains reliable as a pipeline management tool
trigger_definition: Every Sunday 20:00
success_metric: CRM hygiene issues < 5 per week
failure_metric: CRM unusable as pipeline tool due to stale data
notes: CRM integration OPEN ITEM

action_description: Weekly summary of all issues, tasks, and items that are unresolved for 7+ days. Routes to appropriate owner or escalates to CEO.
business_goal: Prevent important items from languishing without resolution
trigger_definition: Every Monday 08:30
success_metric: No item unresolved for 14+ days without escalation
failure_metric: Critical issue dropped with no resolution path

action_description: Detect when CEO calendar has no protected deep-work blocks in a given week and recommend inserting 2-hour focus blocks.
business_goal: Prevent CEO from being fully consumed by reactive work
trigger_definition: Every Friday reviewing next week's calendar
success_metric: At least 4 hours of protected focus time per week
failure_metric: Zero focus blocks in a week

action_description: Process raw meeting notes and voice memos into structured summaries with action items, decisions, and context stored in the knowledge base.
business_goal: Eliminate time spent organizing raw notes
trigger_definition: New raw note or transcript added to intake folder
success_metric: Notes structured and filed within 1 hour of intake
failure_metric: Raw notes pile up unprocessed for 7+ days

action_description: Detect project or operational budget variances exceeding 10%. Surface with context and draft escalation note.
business_goal: Prevent cost overruns from compounding undetected
trigger_definition: Budget variance > 10% detected in financial system
success_metric: Variance detected and escalated within 48 hours of threshold breach
failure_metric: Variance discovered at month-end review
notes: Requires accounting system integration — currently OPEN ITEM

action_description: Monthly self-audit of the action allowlist: identify actions not executed in 30 days, propose deprecations, surface new candidates from recent work patterns.
business_goal: Keep the allowlist alive and relevant rather than stale
trigger_definition: First Monday of each month
success_metric: At least 3 deprecation candidates or new candidates identified monthly
failure_metric: Allowlist unchanged for 3 months

action_description: Monthly, draft an investor update covering project milestones, pipeline, and key metrics for CEO review and send.
trigger_definition: First Monday of each month
success_metric: Investor update sent monthly
failure_metric: Update skipped two months in a row

action_description: Weekly scan of competitor announcements, project filings, and public activity relevant to Eldon Land Supply market position.
business_goal: Maintain awareness of competitive landscape without manual research
trigger_definition: Every Friday 13:00
success_metric: Weekly competitive summary delivered
failure_metric: Competitor announcement missed for more than 2 weeks
notes: Requires web search integration — OPEN ITEM

action_description: When documents are created or received, auto-apply standard naming convention and file in correct project/deal folder.
business_goal: Eliminate time wasted finding misfiled documents
trigger_definition: New document received or created
success_metric: Documents findable without search in <30 seconds
failure_metric: Team spending time searching for misfiled docs
notes: Requires file storage integration — OPEN ITEM

action_description: Remind staff to submit expense reports by the 5th of each month. Escalate to CEO if missing by the 10th.
business_goal: Prevent delayed expense reporting from distorting financials
trigger_definition: 5th and 10th of each month
success_metric: All expense reports submitted by the 10th
failure_metric: Monthly close delayed by missing expense data
